title: M22 Target Start Date Backfill Convergence

items.title: Sync CLI supports explicit target start date
items.description: Market-data sync can resolve a backfill window from a concrete target_start_biz_date via --target-start-biz-date.

items.title: history_backfill supports target_start_biz_date
items.description: The history_backfill service path, queue payload, worker, runtime metadata and HTTP API all accept target_start_biz_date in addition to lookback_open_days and explicit date ranges.

items.title: Scheduler can target a concrete coverage start date
items.description: When QUANTA_HISTORY_BACKFILL_TARGET_START_BIZ_DATE is configured, the scheduler will treat insufficient history coverage as unsettled and use the target start date ahead of target_open_days.

items.title: Live backfill converges corporate-action coverage with target dates
items.description: Explicit target_start_biz_date live runs can first surface a boundary gap at the event boundary and then eliminate it by pushing the coverage start date earlier.
